name: PJM Hub-Locational Analysis
summary: Join PJM locational positions to the node-to-zone reference table, then aggregate volume_mwh and position count by (zone, hour_ending) for the WESTERN HUB / AEP / DOM exposure dashboard.
pythonSource:
import pandas as pd

# lmp_positions.csv: position_id, trader_id, trade_date, iso, node_id, node_name,
#   zone, volume_mwh, position_type (LONG/SHORT), source_lmp, dest_lmp,
#   delivery_date, hour_ending
positions = pd.read_csv("lmp_positions.csv")

# node_to_zone.csv: node_id, node_name, zone, lat, lon, voltage_kv, region
nodes = pd.read_csv("node_to_zone.csv")

# Enrich each locational position with its zone.
enriched = positions.merge(
    nodes,
    on="node_id",
    how="left",
)

# Roll up volume and position count by (zone, hour_ending).
# Common PJM zones in the data: WESTERN HUB, AEP, DOM, AECO, ComEd.
by_zone = enriched.groupby(["zone", "hour_ending"]).agg({
    "volume_mwh": "sum",
    "position_id": "count",
}).reset_index()
by_zone.to_csv("pjm_hub_locational.csv", index=False)

name: Trade-Event Aggregation per Trader
summary: Real-time trade-lifecycle event stream from Endur and Allegro: count distinct trades and total events per trader for the trading-floor activity dashboard.
pythonSource:
import pandas as pd

# trade_events.csv: event_id, trade_id, trader_id, event_type
#   (BOOKED / AMENDED / CANCELLED / MATCHED / SETTLED), event_at,
#   source_system (Endur / Allegro / Internal / Exchange),
#   session_id, instrument, region
events = pd.read_csv("trade_events.csv")

# trade_id COUNTD = distinct trades touched per trader.
# event_id COUNT  = total event volume per trader.
per_trader = events.groupby("trader_id").agg({
    "trade_id": "nunique",
    "event_id": "count",
}).reset_index()
per_trader.to_csv("trade_event_per_trader.csv", index=False)

name: ERCOT Zonal Roll-Up
summary: Roll up the 5-minute ERCOT LMP feed by (zone, hour_ending), averaging lmp/congestion/losses to produce the canonical desk view across HOUSTON / NORTH / SOUTH / WEST.
pythonSource:
import pandas as pd

# 5-minute LMP feed for ERCOT.
# ercot_lmp.csv: zone (HOUSTON / NORTH / SOUTH / WEST), node_id, hour_ending,
#   timestamp, lmp, congestion, losses, energy_component.
ercot_lmp = pd.read_csv("ercot_lmp.csv")

# Roll up to (zone, hour_ending) — the canonical desk view.
zonal_avg = ercot_lmp.groupby(["zone", "hour_ending"]).agg({
    "lmp": "mean",
    "congestion": "mean",
    "losses": "mean",
}).reset_index()

zonal_avg.to_csv("ercot_zonal_avg.csv", index=False)

name: Gas Storage Swap Intrinsic
summary: Join storage positions to forward curves, derive intrinsic value via a GREL-translated spread formula, and roll up by storage facility — the gas-storage book's intrinsic-value report.
pythonSource:
import pandas as pd

# Storage-swap intrinsic value: storage positions valued against the
# inject-month / withdraw-month forward spread.
# storage_positions.csv: position_id, storage_facility, inject_month,
#   withdraw_month, volume_mmbtu, inject_price, withdraw_price.
storage_positions = pd.read_csv("storage_positions.csv")
forward_curves = pd.read_csv("forward_curves.csv")

# Pull the live forward at each leg (winter-summer or seasonal spread).
priced = storage_positions.merge(
    forward_curves,
    left_on="withdraw_month",
    right_on="tenor",
    how="left",
)

# Intrinsic value = volume * (withdraw forward - inject forward).
priced = priced.assign(
    intrinsic_value=lambda x: x["volume_mmbtu"] * (x["withdraw_price"] - x["inject_price"]),
)

# Roll up by storage facility for the gas-storage book.
by_facility = priced.groupby("storage_facility").agg({
    "intrinsic_value": "sum",
    "volume_mmbtu": "sum",
}).reset_index()

by_facility.to_csv("gas_storage_intrinsic.csv", index=False)

name: ISO Settlement Prep
summary: Join positions to settlement charges (MCC + MLC + MWh charge), derive total_settle via GREL, and roll up per-trader settlement totals — the canonical ISO-settlement reconciliation prep.
pythonSource:
import pandas as pd

# ISO settlement prep: positions joined to MCC, MLC, and MWh charges.
# positions.csv: trader_id, node_id, settlement_date, mwh, position_type.
# settlement_charges.csv: node_id, settlement_date, mcc, mlc, mwh_charge.
positions = pd.read_csv("positions.csv")
settlement_charges = pd.read_csv("settlement_charges.csv")

# Join charges onto each settlement-day position.
priced = positions.merge(
    settlement_charges,
    on=["node_id", "settlement_date"],
    how="left",
)

# Total settle = MCC + MLC + MWh charge, all multiplied by mwh.
priced = priced.assign(
    total_settle=lambda x: x["mwh"] * (x["mcc"] + x["mlc"] + x["mwh_charge"]),
)

# Per-trader settlement summary for the ISO-settlement reconciliation.
by_trader = priced.groupby("trader_id").agg({
    "total_settle": "sum",
    "mwh": "sum",
}).reset_index()

by_trader.to_csv("iso_settlement_summary.csv", index=False)
